description_long: This object is a classic revolver-style firearm with a long, slender barrel and a dark metallic finish. The frame and cylinder are robust, with a visible hammer at the rear and a rounded trigger guard beneath. The grip is made of polished wood, ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling, and contrasts with the metal components. The barrel is notably elongated, with a slight taper and a front sight post. The cylinder appears to have multiple chambers, typical of a revolver, and the overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century Colt or Remington models. The object exhibits a combination of metallic and wooden textures, with a sleek, well-maintained appearance.
description: A long-barreled, dark metal revolver with a polished wooden grip and a robust, classic design. The firearm features a prominent cylinder and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the wooden grip, and the prominent cylinder.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the curvature of the wooden grip and the top of the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, cylinder, and the ergonomic wooden grip.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the barrel's muzzle and the alignment of the grip and frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no finger grooves
